title: Claude Dispatch Just Dropped, And It Kills OpenClaw
summary: Claude Dispatch is Anthropic's new feature for agentic workflows through the Claude app. It provides a more secure alternative to OpenClaw by running autonomous tasks directly within Claude rather than through third-party platforms like Telegram.
